description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and elongated representation of an adult pedestrian, with a human head and upper torso visible at the top of a series of stretched, angular, and twisted forms. The head and shoulders are relatively realistic, but the rest of the body is unnaturally extended into sharp, tapering limbs and geometric planes, giving the figure a surreal and abstract appearance. The surface is smooth and mostly uniform, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The figure's clothing is form-fitting and appears to be a single-piece garment, but the extreme distortion makes it difficult to discern specific details. The asset does not display any visible accessories or carried objects. The overall structure is not physically plausible for a real human and would not function as a typical pedestrian in an urban environment.
description: A highly distorted, elongated adult figure with a realistic head and upper torso, but with the rest of the body stretched into sharp, abstract forms. The surface is smooth and glossy, and the figure wears a form-fitting garment.
description_view_0: The front view shows the head and upper torso clearly, with the body extending downward and outward into long, angular shapes.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the extreme elongation and tapering of the limbs, with sharp, pointed extensions dominating the silhouette.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the head and shoulders, with the body stretching away in a dramatic, twisted fashion.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the abstract, stretched geometry and the glossy surface finish.
